hero.headline: Your beautiful, fast link-in-bio with honest analytics.
hero.subtitle: Create a lightweight public page for links, contact points and social profiles — with no forced branding and no visitor privacy trade-offs.

features.title: Built for creators, freelancers and small businesses

speed.title: Fast public profile
speed.desc: SSR/SSG with a mobile-first focus so pages load almost instantly and convert better.

editor.title: Simple, flexible editor
editor.desc: Avatar, bio, links, social blocks, contact actions and ready-made themes in a focused dashboard.

analytics.title: No-PII analytics
analytics.desc: Track views, clicks and CTR per link with daily aggregation and no visitor tracking.

demo.title: See the ligcentro demo profile
demo.subtitle: Preview the public profile your visitors will see before creating an account.

footer.copyright: © {year} ligcentro. A Brazilian link-in-bio product focused on performance, privacy and clarity.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
errors.request_failed: The request could not be completed right now.
errors.handleFormat: Use 3 to 30 lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Access your local dashboard with the mock auth flow.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Pick a unique handle to start your ligcentro profile.

dashboard.description: Your mock session is active. The full editor arrives in the next phase.

Dashboard.title: Build your ligcentro
Dashboard.description: Edit avatar, bio, links and theme. Published changes appear on the public profile.
Dashboard.themesDescription: Choose a visual base and update the public profile instantly.
